Part.Source:
for Each order EmpCod, PdvCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PdvRandon = &PdvRandon //PRA SABER SE É UM PDV VALIDO &PdvCod = PdvCod &PDvId = PdvId &OriCtaBanCod = PdvCtaBanCod &PdvCtaBanCodCofre = PdvCtaBanCodCofre
Exit When none Return EndFor
&LogGUID = GUID.NewGuid() GravaLogDev.Call(&EmpCod, 0, &LogGUID, &Pgmname, '&sdtTEFLongVarchar', &sdtTEFLongVarchar)
&AuxsdtTEFLongVarchar = &sdtTEFLongVarchar &AuxsdtTEFLongVarchar = &AuxsdtTEFLongVarchar.Replace('<', '<') &AuxsdtTEFLongVarchar = &AuxsdtTEFLongVarchar.Replace('>', '>') &AuxsdtTEFLongVarchar = &AuxsdtTEFLongVarchar.Replace('§', '') &AuxsdtTEFLongVarchar = &AuxsdtTEFLongVarchar.Replace('&', '')
GravaLogDev.Call(&EmpCod, 0, &LogGUID, &Pgmname, '&AuxsdtTEFLongVarchar', &AuxsdtTEFLongVarchar)
&SdtRetornoPDV.Adicional1 = &AuxsdtTEFLongVarchar
&SdtRetornoPDV.Adicional2 = &sdtTEFLongVarchar &sdtGetTEF.FromXml(&AuxsdtTEFLongVarchar)
GravaLogDev.Call(&EmpCod, 0, &LogGUID, &Pgmname, '&sdtGetTEF', &sdtGetTEF.ToXml())
For Each Order EmpCod, TefCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TefGUID = &sdtGetTEF.TefGuiD
&TefCod = TefCod TefFilCod = &sdtGetTEF.TefFilCod TefPedCod = &sdtGetTEF.TefPedCod TefBanCarCod = &sdtGetTEF.TefBanCarCod TefBand = &sdtGetTEF.TefBand TefDtaSol = &sdtGetTEF.TefDtaSol TefHorSol = &sdtGetTEF.TefHorSol TefSts = &sdtGetTEF.TefSts TefCreDebVou = &sdtGetTEF.TefCreDebVou TefCrePar = &sdtGetTEF.TefCrePar TefID = &sdtGetTEF.TefID TefIdAut = &sdtGetTEF.TefIdAut TefStsSyncServ = 'S' TefVlr = &sdtGetTEF.TEfVlr TefBandCod = &sdtGetTEF.TefBandCod TefBandCnpj = &sdtGetTEF.TefBandCnpj.Trim() TefCardNom = &sdtGetTEF.TefCardNom.Trim()
exit When none UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Call(domParCOD.TEF, &EmpCod, 0, &TefCod) new EmpCod = &EmpCod TefCod = &TefCod TefFilCod = &sdtGetTEF.TefFilCod TefPedCod = &sdtGetTEF.TefPedCod TefBanCarCod = &sdtGetTEF.TefBanCarCod TefBand = &sdtGetTEF.TefBand TefDtaSol = &sdtGetTEF.TefDtaSol TefHorSol = &sdtGetTEF.TefHorSol TefSts = &sdtGetTEF.TefSts TefCreDebVou = &sdtGetTEF.TefCreDebVou TefCrePar = &sdtGetTEF.TefCrePar TefID = &sdtGetTEF.TefID TefStsSyncServ = 'S' TefVlr = &sdtGetTEF.TEfVlr TefGUID = &sdtGetTEF.TefGuiD TefBandCod = &sdtGetTEF.TefBandCod TefBandCnpj = &sdtGetTEF.TefBandCnpj.Trim() TefCardNom = &sdtGetTEF.TefCardNom.Trim() endnew EndFor
Commit
GravaLogDev.Call(&EmpCod, 0, &LogGUID, &Pgmname, 'TEF Commit', '')
For &sdtGetTEFHistorico in &sdtGetTEF.Historico For Each Order EmpCod, TefCod, TefItmID Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TefCod = &TefCod Where TefItmID = &sdtGetTEFHistorico.TefItmID
TefItmSts = &sdtGetTEFHistorico.TefItmSts TefMsg = &sdtGetTEFHistorico.TefMsg TefItmStsSyncServ = 'S' TefItmDtaHor = serverNow() Exit When None
NEw EmpCod = &EmpCod TefCod = &TefCod TefItmID = &sdtGetTEFHistorico.TefItmID TefItmSts = &sdtGetTEFHistorico.TefItmSts TefItmDtaHor = serverNow() TefMsg = &sdtGetTEFHistorico.TefMsg TefItmStsSyncServ = 'S' EndNEw
EndFor
Commit EndFor
//RETORNA STATUS GRAVADO COM SUCESSO &SdtRetornoPDV.Codigo = 1 &SdtRetornoPDV.Mensagem = 'TEF LANCADA SERVIDOR'
Sub 'subException_handler'
GravaLogDevNew(&EmpCod,&LogGUID,&Pgmname,'subException_handler',&sdtTEFLongVarchar)
EndSub
Sub 'subError_handler'
GravaLogDevNew(&EmpCod,&LogGUID,&Pgmname,'subError_handler',&sdtTEFLongVarchar)
EndSub
